clearTransactions.title: Clear Transaction History
clearTransactions.description: Clearing your transaction history will permanently remove them from the ENS app. Your transactions will still be visible on the blockchain.

rpc.title: Custom RPC endpoint
rpc.description: By default the app uses an ENS-operated RPC endpoint. You can point it at your own JSON-RPC endpoint instead. This is stored on this device only and applies to the network this app serves.
rpc.label: RPC URL

exclusive.title: Use only my RPC endpoint
exclusive.description: Disable the ENS-operated fallback so all requests go to your endpoint.
exclusive.warning: With no fallback, the app may stop working if your endpoint goes down or blocks browser requests.

validate.invalidProtocol: URL must start with http:// or https://

probe.wrongChain: This endpoint reports a different network (chain ID {{chainId}}) and cannot be used here.
probe.unreachable: Could not reach this endpoint. Check the URL and that it allows browser (CORS) requests.
probe.timeout: This endpoint took too long to respond.
probe.invalidResponse: This endpoint did not return a valid JSON-RPC response.

primary.title: Primary Name
primary.noNameDescription: A primary name links your address to a name, allowing dApps to display a name as your profile when connected to them. Only normalized names are shown. <primaryNameLink>Learn about primary names</primaryNameLink>

networkSpecificPrimaryNames.title: Network-specific primary names
networkSpecificPrimaryNames.tooltip: Network-specific primary names will override your default primary name on their specific network.
networkSpecificPrimaryNames.description: Network-specific primary names will override your default primary name on their specific network.
